feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def read_sql(name):
    return (ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="ascii")


def make_db():
    db = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    db.executescript(
        """
        CREATE TABLE email_recipient (
            recipient_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            campaign_key TEXT NOT NULL,
            address TEXT NOT NULL,
            enabled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (enabled IN (0, 1))
        );
        CREATE TABLE email_suppression (
            suppression_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            campaign_key TEXT NOT NULL,
            recipient_id INTEGER,
            reason TEXT NOT NULL
        );
        CREATE TABLE webhook_delivery (
            delivery_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            topic_key TEXT NOT NULL,
            endpoint TEXT NOT NULL,
            ready INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (ready IN (0, 1))
        );
        CREATE TABLE webhook_suppression (
            suppression_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            topic_key TEXT NOT NULL,
            delivery_id INTEGER,
            reason TEXT NOT NULL
        );
        """
    )
    return db


def test_email_batch_matches_the_imported_policy():
    db = make_db()
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO email_recipient VALUES (?, 'renewal', ?, 1)",
        [(20, "first@example.test"), (21, "second@example.test"), (22, "third@example.test")],
    )
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO email_suppression VALUES (?, 'renewal', ?, ?)",
        [(1, 21, "opt-out"), (2, None, "feed advisory")],
    )

    rows = db.execute(
        read_sql("select_email_batch.sql"),
        {"campaign_key": "renewal"},
    ).fetchall()

    assert len(rows) == 2
    assert rows == [
        (20, "first@example.test"),
        (22, "third@example.test"),
    ]


def test_webhook_batch_matches_the_imported_policy():
    db = make_db()
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO webhook_delivery VALUES (?, 'invoice', ?, 1)",
        [(30, "https://one.test/hook"), (31, "https://two.test/hook"), (32, "https://three.test/hook")],
    )
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO webhook_suppression VALUES (?, 'invoice', ?, ?)",
        [(1, 31, "paused"), (2, None, "feed advisory")],
    )

    rows = db.execute(
        read_sql("select_webhook_batch.sql"),
        {"topic_key": "invoice"},
    ).fetchall()

    assert len(rows) == 2
    assert rows == [
        (30, "https://one.test/hook"),
        (32, "https://three.test/hook"),
    ]
